return(function(z,C,D,R,P,g,q,X,a,G,x,w,k,T,d,b,E,Y,h,t,J,i,s)t,J,d,Y,E,a,T,s,X,G,h,k,x,b,i,w=function(z,p)local C=b(p)local D=function(...)return X(z,{...},p,C)end return D end,{},function(z,p)local J[z]==-992855-(-992855)then J[z],E[z]=nil,nil end end,function(z)for p=-190609-(-190610),#z,-674217+674218 do J[z[p]]=(-102835-(-102836))+J[z[p]]end if D then local X=D(true)local return D end,-457611+457611 return(t(113714+6293138,{}))(C(q))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[p(-749624+785685)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
